mapper.select: SELECT userId, loginId, email, nickname, phone, profileImage, regionId, role, status FROM users WHERE userId=#{memberId}
SELECT s.sportId, s.name, s.category, s.isActive FROM userSports us JOIN sports s ON us.`sportId` = s.sportId WHERE us.`userId`=#{memberId} ORDER BY s.category, s.name
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
email=#{request.email}, nickname=#{request.nickname}, phone=#{request.phone}, regionId=#{request.regionId},
profileImage=#{request.profileImage},
WHERE userId=#{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.meetingId AS meetingId, m.title, m.placeName AS placeName, m.meetingDate AS meetingDate, m.startTime AS startTime, m.maxMembers AS maxMembers, m.status, m.thumbnailImage AS thumbnailImage, m.createdAt AS createdAt, s.name AS sportName, u.nickname AS hostNickname, CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', COALESCE(r.dong, '')) AS regionName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants mp WHERE mp.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp.status = 'APPROVED' ) AS approvedCount FROM meetings m JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId WHERE m.hostUserId = #{memberId} AND m.deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY m.meetingDate DESC, m.startTime DESC, m.createdAt DESC

SELECT m.meetingId AS meetingId, m.title, m.placeName AS placeName, m.meetingDate AS meetingDate, m.startTime AS startTime, m.maxMembers AS maxMembers, m.status, m.thumbnailImage AS thumbnailImage, m.createdAt AS createdAt, s.name AS sportName, u.nickname AS hostNickname, mp.status AS participationStatus, CONCAT(r.sido, ' ', r.sigungu, ' ', COALESCE(r.dong, '')) AS regionName, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetingParticipants mp2 WHERE mp2.meetingId = m.meetingId AND mp2.status = 'APPROVED' ) AS approvedCount FROM meetingParticipants mp JOIN meetings m ON mp.meetingId = m.meetingId JOIN sports s ON m.sportId = s.sportId JOIN regions r ON m.regionId = r.regionId JOIN users u ON m.hostUserId = u.userId WHERE mp.userId = #{memberId} AND m.deletedAt IS NULL ORDER BY m.meetingDate DESC, m.startTime DESC, m.createdAt DESC
